texto: There are no words to express the abyss between isolation and having one ally. It may be conceded to the mathematician that four is twice two. But two is not twice one
autor: two is two thousand times one.
explicacao: Citação de two is two thousand times one. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There are no words to express the abyss between isolation and having one ally. It may be conceded…” articula reflexao, g-k-chesterton, twice em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
